title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pratham Education

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pratham Education
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
